attacking_style: Opportunistic breakaway specialist who attacks from small groups in the final kilometer, particularly on climbs. Shows tactical sharpness with late-race positioning (300m attacks) after multi-climb attrition.
team_tactics: Given freedom to contest secondary classifications (KOM) and breakaway stage wins when team leader not in contention. Team prioritizes opportunistic gains over GC support in specific stages.
terrain_preference: Multi-climb mountain stages that create attrition and reduce bunch size. Excels in breakaway scenarios with 5-10 riders on final climbs where positioning and timing matter more than raw power.
vulnerability: Susceptible to pure power attacks from GC contenders in final meters (held off Evenepoel only by margins). Effectiveness depends on breakaway freedom rather than leading from distance.
key_patterns: Contests secondary classifications via breakaways when team strategy allows (KOM points, stage hunting)
Attacks from small groups inside final kilometer on climbs, using positioning over sustained efforts
Shows strongest form after multi-climb attrition reduces field to select groups
form_trajectory: positive: 2023 Vuelta stage win demonstrated evolved tactical sharpness and ability to execute against top GC riders
built_from: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 20
2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 20
